meaning: n.澶у皬,鏁伴噺,宸ㄥぇ,骞垮ぇ,閲忕骇
examples: We did not realize the magnitude of the problem.
America and Russia do not face a problem of the same order of magnitude as Japan.
The devastating 7.9 magnitude Sichuan earthquake which killed about 90,000 people in western China.
Birkbeck says it has seen falls in its own student numbers of a similar magnitude.
On the basis of original intent, the IMF is failing by a nosebleed order of magnitude.
